user.title: AH Connect
user.description: Connect Albert Heijn to Home Assistant. Choose how you want to authenticate.

appie_config.title: Import appie-go config
appie_config.description: Run `appie login` via the appie-go CLI, then paste the contents of `~/.config/appie/config.json`.

authorization_code.title: Advanced fallback: authorization code
authorization_code.description: Use this only if appie-go CLI import is not possible. Obtain an authorization code via the appie-go compatible OAuth flow.

error.invalid_json: Invalid JSON. Check the config file contents.
error.missing_access_token: No access token found in config.
error.missing_refresh_token: No refresh token found in config.
error.invalid_auth: Could not exchange authorization code for tokens.
